description: Uploaded Source-of-Truth Audit for Replay Refresh
head: 5356da5

source_candidates_inspected.assessment: PRIMARY SOURCE FOUND — This backup contains draw 115000041 with full data. It was created at 2026-05-25 09:38:50, after draw 115000041 was inserted at 08:22:13. The current production DB does not have this draw.
Does not contain 115000041+. This backup was made after some DB state that removed 115000041. Matches current production DB max.
Pre-P7 backup. Same max as production DB. No new draws.
P59 bak file (created 13:56 on May 25, after the first backup C1 at 09:38). Does NOT contain 115000041 — confirms DB was rolled back to 115000040 by the time of P59 execution.
Legacy DB. Stale — max draw 114000095 (Nov 2025). Not a source for recent draws.
BIG_LOTTO only (draws 97000020-97000105, timestamp 2026-01-15). No POWER_LOTTO data at all.
BIG_LOTTO festival bonus draw data only. No POWER_LOTTO (威力彩) rows.
Identical content to C7. BIG_LOTTO festival data only. No POWER_LOTTO rows.
Empty POWER_LOTTO draws table. Not a source.
Last POWER_LOTTO ingest was 115000040 on 2026-05-18. No logged ingestion for 115000041. The 2026-05-25 08:22:13 creation in backup C1 was NOT logged through the standard backfill pipeline.

key_timeline.2026-05-18T14:53:53Z: POWER_LOTTO draw 115000040 backfilled via standard pipeline (logged in ingest_log.jsonl)
key_timeline.2026-05-25T08:22:13: Draw 115000041 created in DB (found in backup C1 with this created_at — NOT logged in ingest_log.jsonl)
key_timeline.2026-05-25T08:25:19Z: scan_missing for POWER_LOTTO returned missing=0 (115000041 was already in DB at this time)
key_timeline.2026-05-25T09:38:50: Backup C1 created — captures DB state WITH draw 115000041
key_timeline.BETWEEN_C1_AND_P59: Draw 115000041 was REMOVED from production DB (mechanism unclear — possible DB restore, rollback, or replacement from older snapshot)
key_timeline.2026-05-25T13:56:38: P59 .bak file created — shows DB back to max 115000040 (115000041 already gone)
key_timeline.2026-05-26T04:42:24: Backup C2 created — confirms max remains 115000040

audit_answers.Q1_where_is_original_source: No standalone uploaded source file (CSV/XLSX/JSON) containing POWER_LOTTO draws was found. The only local source containing draw 115000041 is a backup DB: backups/lottery_v2_pre_p66_wave6_20260525_093850.db. The draw was inserted at 2026-05-25 08:22:13 through a mechanism not logged in ingest_log.jsonl (possibly direct DB write or API call outside the standard pipeline).
audit_answers.Q2_which_local_files_contain_draw_histor: See source_candidates_inspected for complete list. Primary candidates: C1 (backup with 115000041), C4 (P59 bak — max 115000040), C5 (legacy DB — max 114000095), lottery-api/data/lottery_history.json (BIG_LOTTO only).
audit_answers.Q4_uploaded_source_contains_115000041_pl: YES — backup C1 contains draw 115000041 with full data: date=2026/05/21, numbers=[6,14,22,28,35,38], special=1. No uploaded file (CSV/XLSX/JSON) was found. The source is a backup DB.
audit_answers.Q5_blocker_root_cause: SCENARIO_A: Source data EXISTS for 115000041 in backup C1, but is not in the current production DB. The draw was inserted at 2026-05-25 08:22:13, captured in backup at 09:38:50, then removed from production before the next captured state (P59 bak at 13:56:38). DB import is incomplete for draw 115000041. Draws 115000042+ are not in any local source (SCENARIO_B applies for draws beyond 115000041).
audit_answers.Q6_safest_next_step: P77B: Controlled canonical draw refresh. Use backup C1 as verified source for draw 115000041. For draws 115000042+, use official API with P76 gates. All imports must go through P76 ingestion gate (schema validation, duplicate check, dry-run, DB backup, controlled_import_id). No direct DB write without governance.

source_of_truth_conclusion.draw_115000042_plus_recommendation: Use official Taiwan Lottery API with P76 ingestion gates

recommended_next_phase.name: Controlled Canonical Draw Refresh
recommended_next_phase.description: Import draw 115000041 from backup C1 into production draws table using P76 ingestion gates. Then fetch and import 115000042+ from official API.
steps: 1. P77B pre-flight: verify backup C1 checksum and draw 115000041 data integrity
2. DB backup: create lottery_v2.db.bak_p77b_<timestamp> before any write
3. Dry-run validation of draw 115000041 data (schema check, duplicate check)
4. Controlled import of 115000041 from backup C1 into draws table (not as replay row)
5. Official API fetch for 115000042+ in dry-run mode per P76 gates
6. Controlled import of 115000042+ after schema validation
7. Post-import verification: draws > 115000040 count > 0, drift guard PASS
8. POWER_LOTTO replay rows for fourier_rhythm_3bet and fourier30_markov30_2bet remain at 1500 (no replay apply in P77B)
constraints: Use existing canonical draws table only
No replay row inserts in P77B
All imports via P76 ingestion gates
recommended_next_phase.unblocks: P74/P75 Batch A apply for fourier_rhythm_3bet and fourier30_markov30_2bet
